textByHash.0bc89ca3be1698c1615cf87fc802c4f7339debf2: I thank you for your hospitality.
textByHash.cf08d8619de58f0618a7876347170912334dbd1e: My name is Selim. Osman is currently on a diplomatic visit. I expect to be filling in for him for the forseeable future.
textByHash.c7850e0e338e14bf9ea84951b2c477c94eed7618: I have told you all that I can.
textByHash.4e4a468a3ffb0e287e6b7d378b0b25656b2e4c6b: I am partial to that juice myself. I will happily take any off your hands.
textByHash.1754f03fe316057ab1cb157a54ddc5e4f45654d5: Like my master, I am partial to juice from the sq'irk fruit. I would appreciate it if you could bring me some.
textByHash.0fb642063263c2fce7aca637cc62982cc8d97f6e: Thank you very much. If you get some more sq'irks be sure to come back.
textByHash.2789001a81947562e0222212605790c46b925d80: Of course. What would you like to know?
textByHash.23a711c72bc1412990677bfbb9715113a69bd79f: There is a sorceress near the south eastern edge of Al Kharid who grows them. She used to be friends with Osman, but they fell out.
textByHash.8a5f58a0d603e244a463335a2752f488ccb67242: I don't know. All I know is she won't give us any more fruit.
textByHash.c918926fa22286542637307a69c2071b00a7ef41: I doubt it will be that easy. She is not renowned for her generosity and is very secretive about her garden's location.
textByHash.372c1664ec5b948921bd5324d4e7d7d0e85eb13f: Her garden has remained hidden even from Osman. I believe it must be hidden by magical means.
textByHash.847a86c30dfadb19d04258b142f17828f3256174: My work requires that I remain here.
textByHash.2d38ae483a11e366a5752b2cc84273caf8540308: Use a pestle and mortar. Make sure you have an empty glass with you to collect the juice.
textByHash.77ee9ece0aa70184bced82815431fe59cfec6299: Of course. I'll train you in the art of Thieving for your troubles.
textByHash.653f7f8d98833c498dc53b43c9469803788c85a2: That depends on the quantity and ripeness of the sq'irks you put into the juice.
textByHash.5e02eb33b40d4afd0079a598fd71ea982d0e9d6f: It is a sweet nectar for a thief or spy. It makes light fingers lighter, fleet feet flightier and comes in four different colours for those who are easily amused.
textByHash.8b817b5f92251fb6661bf53653114e6535a018f1: It only holds power over those with poor self-control. Something which I have an abundance of.
textByHash.a7771aee516c4d025414fd361ff702ddd6c6c823: Would you like a dagger or a partisan?
textByHash.70fcf07eedd6cb8c0a4da65a64329e939b210310: Well you know where I am if you reconsider.
textByHash.67b105a7720cd4e2d37a445074b3d8674278ce00: Well done. I have new information to share with you.
